title: WonderWorld
description: WonderWorld modpack for 1.20.1, without annoying and typical mods.
body:
Welcome to Wonderworld! This modpack based without typical and annoying mods, the modpack is a kind of mixture of semi-vanilla, tech industry, and some rpg. In this modpack you can do:
- explore incredible caves, and the underground biome with dinosaurs
- many cooking possibilitiesbaked potatoes, watermelon ice cream, wine, cheese, beer, whiskey and a lot of meal!
- improved combat system, some weapons and new bosses
- form your own colony, build big buildings and, and your workers

I almost forgot! This modpack supports Pojavlauncher!


I have plans to add quests to this assembly! and also add some mods that will fit into the style of minecraft.



The main mods of this modpack:
- Minecolonies
- Alex's caves
- Let's do mods
- Farmer's delight
- pneumathic craft
